venue.name: Cambridge Foundry
venue.blurb: A fictional-but-plausible builder venue a short walk from the Red Line, packed with demo tables, espresso, and too many half-finished side projects.

sessions.title: Lightning demos from the floor
sessions.desc: Fast demos from local builders shipping agents, copilots, and delightfully scrappy prototypes.

sessions.title: Open mic problem swap
sessions.desc: Pitch a stuck point, find a collaborator, and leave with a concrete next step.

sessions.title: Local-first AI tools
sessions.desc: A short talk on privacy-friendly workflows, local models, and practical deployment for real people.

sessions.title: Project matchmaking
sessions.desc: Structured networking for people who want to jam on an idea after the meetup.

sessions.title: Boston builder afterparty
sessions.desc: A last round of intros for people heading to post-meetup hacking sessions across Cambridge and Somerville.

attendees.name: Omar
attendees.lookingFor: Founder with a real user problem

themes: Meetup demos that turn into real products
